## Claim impact

Describe any changed public claims and the evidence that supports them.

## Evidence impact

List changed evidence files, manifests, examples, or diagrams.

## Redaction reviewed

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, local operator details, or raw private receipts are included.
- [ ] No active grants or permits are included.

## Non-claims preserved

- [ ] Production readiness is not claimed.
- [ ] Autonomous batch authority is not claimed.
- [ ] Release or deploy authority is not claimed.

## Validation

- [ ] Secret scan passed.
- [ ] Public examples remain non-authorizing.
- [ ] Relative links and schemas pass.

## AI assistance

Disclose whether AI assistance was used and how outputs were reviewed.
